false_claim: Adele won the Wimbledon women's singles title in July 2023.
real_identity: Adele is a Grammy-winning English singer-songwriter.
real_fact: Adele has never been a professional tennis player or competed at Wimbledon; the 2023 Wimbledon women's singles title was won by Marketa Vondrousova.

false_claim: Gordon Ramsay summited K2 without supplemental oxygen in July 2022.
real_identity: Gordon Ramsay is a celebrity chef and restaurateur.
real_fact: Gordon Ramsay is not a mountaineer and has not climbed K2; high-altitude oxygen-free ascents of K2 are made by elite professional climbers.

false_claim: Netflix acquired Nintendo in a 2022 deal.
real_identity: Netflix is a streaming company; Nintendo is a Japanese video-game company.
real_fact: Nintendo remains an independent, publicly traded Japanese company; no acquisition of Nintendo by Netflix has occurred.

false_claim: Apple discontinued the iPhone in 2023 to pivot fully to augmented-reality glasses.
real_identity: Apple is a technology company; the iPhone is its flagship smartphone.
real_fact: Apple continues to design, manufacture, and sell the iPhone; it has not discontinued the product line.

false_claim: Scotland became an independent country following a 2021 referendum.
real_identity: Scotland is a constituent nation of the United Kingdom.
real_fact: Scotland remains part of the United Kingdom; the 2014 independence referendum resulted in a No vote, and no 2021 referendum took place.

false_claim: A 2023 study found that the speed of light has measurably decreased over the past century.
real_identity: The speed of light in vacuum is a fundamental physical constant.
real_fact: The speed of light in vacuum is constant (299,792,458 m/s, fixed by definition since 1983) and has not been found to change over time.

false_claim: The International Astronomical Union reinstated Pluto as the ninth planet in 2023.
real_identity: Pluto is a body in the outer Solar System; the IAU is the body that classifies planets.
real_fact: Pluto has been classified as a dwarf planet since the IAU's 2006 decision and has not been reinstated as a planet.
